ddls:
CREATE TABLE "officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "honorific" TEXT /* Honorific of the official (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Dr.) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the official */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the official belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role in the system (e.g., administrator, data entry, committee member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent the country is located in */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "committee_code" TEXT /* Code for the committee */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chairperson of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's responsibilities */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the committee */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the committee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official who took the trip */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee the trip was for */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country visited */,
  "expenditure_details" TEXT /* Details of the expenditure */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the trip */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the trip */,
  "actual_expenditure" REAL /* Total actual expenditure for the trip */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trip (e.g., planned, completed, canceled) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the official who approved the trip */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the trip was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the expenditure was for */,
  "expenditure_date" TEXT /* Date of the expenditure */,
  "expenditure_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expenditure */,
  "expenditure_description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expenditure (e.g., airfare, accommodation, meals) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the expenditure */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Name of the vendor or service provider */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditures_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_members" (
  "committee_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee member */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee the member belongs to */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official who is a member of the committee */,
  "role_in_committee" TEXT /* Role of the official in the committee (e.g., member, vice-chair) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the official joined the committee */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the official left the committee (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)
